issue.title: Sweep remaining Python under src/bigclaw batch D

commands: find src/bigclaw tests scripts bigclaw-go/scripts -type f -name '*.py' 2>/dev/null | sort
cd bigclaw-go/internal/regression && go test -count=1 repo_helpers_test.go big_go_22_zero_python_guard_test.go

residual_risk: The repository-wide physical Python file count was already 0 at lane entry, so this issue hardens and documents the migrated state instead of lowering a nonzero Python inventory.
